violations.text: Working containers of dry ingredients were not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of residue and other debris. Ice machine is to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026
The door to one of the restrooms is not self-closing. Restroom doors must be self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

Ambient temperature of the refrigerator observed at 47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025
Hot water temperature at the 3-bay sink observed at 101 degrees F. Hot water for washing must be at least 110 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025
The receptacle in one of the restrooms is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2025
The door to one of the restrooms is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2025
The door to one of the restrooms is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2025
